description: Junit discusses the development of Bulk, a decentralized market maker on-chain that allows token creators to implement market-making strategies trustlessly. The app is in development and will be live soon after completing an angel round.
topic_summary: Junit introduces Bulk, a decentralized market maker aimed at enhancing market health on Solana, with plans to compete against established market makers [t=15:36]. The app is not yet live but will be available for testing shortly [t=27:02].
